tweet.text:
Following @darin97168 for a bit and I’m genuinely impressed with the performance. Solid gains so far🚀📪📟🚿
META  Earnings  AI stocks #InterestRates #Investing
 $COIN $ZS https://t.co/8M8cXX2Xmy

Good Morning! 

Futures are up, with ES +61.

$BTC is trying to move higher. It's over $82k this morning. Watch $CRCL $COIN and $MSTR.

Oil prices are dropping. WTI crude is back under $100. It's currently around $91 this morning.

The U.S. is reportedly getting close to a deal with Iran on a one page memorandum of understanding to end the conflict. 

The memorandum is expected to set a detailed plan for comprehensive nuclear talks between the two countries. 

$HUT is up 34% pre-market on news of a major 15 year, $9.8 billion AI data center lease, expanding its contracted AI backlog to $16.8 billion total. This builds on its ongoing pivot from Bitcoin mining to high value AI infrastructure. 

$ALAB is up 6% pre-market after its strong Q1 earnings beat, with upbeat Q2 guidance, driven by surging AI connectivity demand. $CRDO is moving with it. 

$AMD is up 20% pre-market after reporting a strong Q1 earnings beat, with revenue up 38% YoY to $10.25B, data center revenue jumping 57% to $5.8B driven by AI demand, EPS $1.37 vs. $1.29 est, plus upbeat Q2 guidance of $11.2 billion in revenue which beat expectations of $10.5 billion. 

$ARM is up 12% pre-market following AMD’s strong Q1 earnings beat and upbeat AI/data center guidance yesterday, boosting sentiment across semiconductor and AI chip stocks.

$INTC is up 6% pre-market due to continued momentum from yesterday’s rally driven by reports of Apple exploring Intel and Samsung for U.S. made device chips, plus a broad AI/semiconductor rally sparked by AMD’s strong earnings beat and upbeat data center guidance.

$VRT is up 6% VRT on the broad AI/data center rally sparked by AMD’s strong earnings beat. They provide essential power and liquid cooling infrastructure for high density AI servers

$TER is up 4% on recent analyst upgrades/price target hikes, strong AI chip testing demand, and the broader semiconductor rally from AMD’s strong earnings. 

$RMBS is up 6% this morning due to the broad AI/semiconductor rally from AMD’s earnings. 

$QCOM is up 6% this morning, continuing its recent rally, now fueled by AMD's earnings. 

$IREN is up 5% IREN is up this morning on continued momentum from its $625M all-stock acquisition of Mirantis to accelerate AI cloud capabilities, plus the recent energization of its 1.4 GW Sweetwater 1 data center site. 

$NVDA is leading the Mag 7 this morning due to chip strength after AMD's strong earnings beat. 

The chip equipment stocks are moving higher this morning on AMD's upbeat earnings with $ASML leading. $ASML $AMAT $LRCX $KLAC

The memory/storage stocks are moving higher on AMD's upbeat earnings with $MU leading. $MU $SNDK $STX $WDC 

The AI optics stocks are also moving higher on AMD's upbeat earnings with $GLW leading. $AAOI $LITE $GLW $COHR $CIEN $FN

$GLW is up 14% pre-market on anticipation for today’s NYSE Investor Event, where they are expected to upgrade long-term growth plans through 2030 and highlight expanding AI data center/photonics opportunities.

All of the airline stocks are exploding this morning due to the huge drop in oil prices. $AAL $UAL $DAL $BA
